title: palicourea dichotoma
intro: Palicourea dichotoma, also known as 'Quina', is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Palicourea dichotoma include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties, although the exact preparation methods may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
